Company vehicle for dormant LLC.  I personally pay all fuel and expenses. I retained all furniture and equipment for former law office that is now dormant. (2025-07-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (2011-01-01)
I will continue to participate in this cash balance pension plan, but the plan sponsor no longer makes contributions. (2021-12-01)
Kriegshauser Ney, LLC (now KN Law Group)

Pursuant to my divestment agreement with Ney Law Firm LLC relating to Kriegshauser Ney Law Group, I am owed accounts receivable for work already performed for Kriegshauser Ney Law Group. These amounts are fixed and will be paid out over the next few years to Kriegshauser Law LLC by Ney Law Firm LLC. (2025-07-01)
My solo legal practice is inactive and will remain inactive during my appointment. All outstanding client fees were fixed before I entered government service. (2025-07-01)
I continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (2021-10-01)
